case_title: NOEL IRA VS. GUSTAVO GOMEZ HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-11-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, GUSTAVO GOMEZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IRA, NOEL AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, GUSTAVO GOMEZ
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IRA, NOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, GUSTAVO GOMEZ $3,875.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,960.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR, AND GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURIES. AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY IRA, NOEL AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, GUSTAVO GOMEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
